历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6826 → 6436 → 7061 → 7171 → 5882, showing an overall fluctuating trend. After the ranking shifted backward to 7171 in 2024, it moved significantly forward to 5882 in 2025, a single-year forward shift of about 1289 places, reflecting a notable increase in popularity among Physics Category candidates in Liaoning. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5882. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 131 in 2021, 128 in 2022, 129 in 2023, 134 in 2024, and 133 in 2025, remaining stable at around 130. The 2026 plan is 114, a decrease of 19 from 2025, a reduction of about 14.3%, which is a significant contraction and will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 35–37 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities with strong engineering capabilities. In 2025, the reputation was positive, with steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Education Program, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%. In 2026, the reputation is negative due to a laboratory explosion safety incident, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology. Douyin popularity ranks 61st overall (average), with high heat in 2023, and overall attention is moderate.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, there are 7 disciplines rated A- or above: Mechanics (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Aerospace Science and Technology (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Information and Communication Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-), with strong capabilities in aerospace and information disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines and attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Liaoning Provincial College Entrance Examination is approximately 200,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (about 199,700). The number of Physics Category candidates in 2025 was about 143,400, and estimated at about 143,600 for 2026 based on historical proportions, with a stable competition base. The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university, so there is no local preference. In 2025, the university enrolled a total of about 51 students in Liaoning (including Physics and History Categories), accounting for about 8.5% of its national total, placing Liaoning in the upper-middle range of enrollment provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong performance of the significant forward shift in rankings in 2025, the negative factor of a 14.3% reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026, and the negative public opinion from the 2026 laboratory explosion, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 5882. The enrollment reduction is the main factor pushing the ranking number higher, while the inertia of increased application popularity from the 2025 reputation improvement partially offsets this. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5428, with a range of 4928–5928.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 4928–5928, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application range, with Tier 1 majors (Chang Kong Innovation Class, Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<4928), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>5928), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety. The university's strengths in aerospace and information disciplines are prominent, and related majors remain highly popular in society. When applying, consider personal interests and employment prospects comprehensively.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1570 → 2055 → 2226 → 2462 → 1897, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking moved backward year by year (from 1570 to 2462), and in 2025 it moved forward significantly to 1897, a single-year forward shift of about 565 places. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 1897. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 5 students in 2021–2022 and 6 students in 2023–2025, remaining stable at 5–6 students. In 2026, the plan is 18 students, an increase of 12 students compared to 2025, a 200% expansion, which will significantly dilute competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. However, the university is strong in science and engineering, with a relatively small scale of liberal arts programs. In 2025, its reputation was generally positive (improved admission scores, Excellent Engineer Plan); in 2026, it was somewhat negative (laboratory explosion). Douyin popularity is average. Overall reputation has a relatively limited impact on liberal arts admissions. Its main strengths lie in engineering, while liberal arts majors (English, Japanese, Business Administration, Law, Radio and Television, etc.) are not its core strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university. In 2025, it admitted only 6 students in History Category in Liaoning Province, expanding to 18 in 2026, significantly increasing its share after expansion, reflecting its intention to expand liberal arts enrollment in Liaoning. Social popularity of foreign language majors is generally wait-and-see, law is divided and wait-and-see, business administration is divided and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance examination takers in the province is about 200,000, with History Category students estimated at about 56,400 in 2026 (based on historical proportion of about 56,300 in 2025), so the competition base is basically stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the positive signal of ranking advancement in 2025, the strong negative factor of a 200% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026, and the university's non-dominant position in liberal arts, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move backward from the 2025 baseline of 1897. Expansion is the overwhelming main factor, and the ranking number will increase significantly. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 4203, with a range of 3703–4703.
